title: ochna semiserrata
intro: Ochna semiserrata, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant or cancer bush, is a shrub native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ochna semiserrata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
